privacy: Artwork, projects and preferences stay on the device unless the person using AIR-DROW explicitly exports, shares or starts an optional AI creation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build validates source integrity, local hand assets, local Kurdish typography, bilingual markup, runtime coverage, export/gesture tests, legacy compatibility, cache contracts and generated production output.
support: Use Settings > About App to review app readiness, hand drawing readiness, language, release information and developer profile.
name: AIR-DROW Final Release + Font Restoration
summary: A complete local drawing source package with restored Kurdish typography, deliberate hand input, protected physical actions and final device-release preparation.
